overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing the player character walking through a dimly lit gothic corridor, opening the Fat Lady portrait to reveal a secret passage, and entering the warm, firelit Gryffindor common room. The environment features detailed medieval architecture with wood paneling, stone arches, tapestries, and magical lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with wood paneling and portraits

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dimly lit corridor toward the large portrait at the end of the hall

entered.detail: stone ribbed vaulting with pointed arches characteristic of gothic architecture
dark wooden wainscoting covering the lower walls
oil paintings in gilded frames hanging on the corridor walls
medieval-style lantern fixtures providing warm illumination
large framed portrait of a woman in a pink dress at the corridor's end

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow, dimly lit gothic corridor with dark wood-paneled walls and a high vaulted stone ceiling. Medieval lanterns cast warm light on framed portraits lining the walls as the camera approaches a large portrait of a woman at the end of the hall.

events.description: the Fat Lady portrait swings open revealing a circular stone passage behind it
exits the stone tunnel into the brightly lit Gryffindor common room

agents.ego_description: stepping through the opened portrait into the secret passage and emerging into the common room

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone passage with circular frame leading into the common room

segments.scene_description: The portrait swings open to reveal a secret stone passage. The player moves through the narrow circular tunnel, transitioning from the dark corridor into the warm, firelit interior of the Gryffindor common room with red carpets and comfortable furniture visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with fireplace and seating areas

events.description: turns left to walk along the tall windows, passing a student sitting in an armchair
approaches the large stone fireplace with burning fire, then turns to explore the upper level area

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room observing the medieval decor, passing seated students, and approaching the central fireplace

notable_agents.action: student sitting in leather armchair reading a book near the tall windows
student walking across the room toward the seating area

entered.detail: massive stone fireplace with carved mantel and burning fire
ornate red and gold patterned carpet covering the stone floor
burgundy leather upholstered chairs and sofas arranged in seating groups
red and gold tapestries and house banners hanging from the high ceiling
tall arched windows with leaded glass showing dark night outside
upper level wooden balcony with railings overlooking the common room

segments.scene_description: The player explores the spacious Gryffindor common room, walking across red patterned carpets past leather armchairs and students relaxing by the fire. The room features high gothic ceilings with hanging banners, tall windows showing the night outside, and a massive stone fireplace as the central focal point. The camera moves around the room, passing antique furniture, suits of armor, and wooden bookshelves.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit gothic corridor into the warm, expansive sanctuary of the Gryffindor common room. It begins by gliding through a narrow hall of dark wood paneling and vaulted stone ceilings, where medieval lanterns illuminate framed portraits. As the camera reaches the end of the hall, a large portrait swings open to reveal a secret stone passage, leading the viewer through a narrow circular tunnel that transitions from shadow into a glow of firelight. The scene then opens into a spacious room filled with red patterned carpets and leather armchairs, shifting the atmosphere from secluded mystery to cozy grandeur. Finally, the camera explores the interior, passing students and suits of armor before settling on a massive stone fireplace beneath high gothic ceilings and hanging banners.
